title: cyclosorus abortivus
intro: Cyclosorus abortivus, also known as the Abortive Lady Fern, is a species of fern native to the tropical and subtropical regions of Asia and Australia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The Abortive Lady Fern is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating wounds, and alleviating respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of Cyclosorus abortivus include infusions, decoctions, and extracts, which are typically used to make teas, tonics, and ointments for medicinal purposes.
